subject: [RFC PATCH 16/40] mm: compaction: walk per-superpageblock free lists for migration targets

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch updates the compaction mechanism in Linux to walk per-superpageblock (SPB) free lists when searching for migration targets. This change is necessary because free pages are stored on per-SPB free lists, not zone-level free lists, and standard compaction's free-page scanner needs to account for this. The patch also updates the pageblock movability bookkeeping to ensure it stays correct during compaction. Additionally, it fixes a check for zones whose start_pfn is not aligned to pageblock_order.
